data.title: CLAUDE.md: cross-epic interaction classifier referenced artifacts not yet created (cross-epic-scan.md, interaction-deferred-tag.md, agent file)
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The CLAUDE.md additions for task 55b9-6b7c reference artifacts that do not yet exist: cross-epic-scan.md prompt, plugins/dso/docs/contracts/interaction-deferred-tag.md contract, and plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md agent file. These are forward declarations preceding implementation.
File: CLAUDE.md
Category: maintainability
